provenance.note: R1-R16 single owner in SourceA; SourceB retains IVR adapter config only

rules.name: evidence_before_claim
rules.summary: Claim observations or completed actions only after tool/workflow evidence.

rules.name: explicit_outcome_state
rules.summary: Declare one terminal outcome; close may not imply a stronger state.

rules.name: customer_language
rules.summary: No internal workflow vocabulary on customer-facing lines.

rules.name: domain_minimum_intake
rules.summary: Industry-specific required fields; name+phone alone is insufficient.

rules.name: urgency_discriminating_signal
rules.summary: Urgency requires recorded approved signal, not category alone.

rules.name: safety_screen_before_escalation
rules.summary: Smallest approved safety question; no invented advice.

rules.name: boundary_without_policy_leakage
rules.summary: State useful next action; avoid system-limitation explanations.

rules.name: promise_discipline
rules.summary: No time/price/outcome promises without policy, tool, SLA, or receipt.

rules.name: capability_state_consistency
rules.summary: One coherent tool capability state; no incompatible claims.

rules.name: correction_canonicalization
rules.summary: Discard superseded values; repeat and store corrected canonical value.

rules.name: outcome_specific_closing
rules.summary: Close matches verified outcome; no forced anything-else on transfers.

rules.name: human_brevity
rules.summary: One or two functions per receptionist line; prefer sequential turns.

rules.name: no_repeat_supplied_info
rules.summary: Move to next missing field when intent is already clear.

rules.name: regulated_language_blocks
rules.summary: Select approved blocks; do not invent disclaimers per script.

rules.name: transcript_summary_agreement
rules.summary: Summary matches outcome, urgency, corrections; never upgrade state.
